name: Pecan-Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, sift together flour, sugar, and salt.
2. Cut the chilled butter into small cubes and add to the flour mixture.
3. Using a pastry blender or two knives, cut the butter into the flour until pea-sized granules form.
4. Sprinkle 1 tablespoon water over the flour and mix slightly.
5. Add another tablespoon of water and mix again.
6. Gather the dough into a ball, adding a little more water if necessary.
7. Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 2 to 3 hours.
8. Roll out the pastry and fit it into a 9-inch pie pan.
9. Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C).
10. In a separate bowl, beat eggs until well blended.
11. Stir in the Pecan Pumpkin Butter and heavy cream until combined.
12. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
13. Bake for 15 minutes at 450°F (230°C), then reduce the heat to 350°F (175°C) and bake for an additional 40 minutes or until the center is just set.
14. Serve the pie at room temperature.
NOTE: Pecan Pumpkin Butter can be purchased from Williams Sonoma, and if measured carefully, each jar will make two pies.
